So now that we've done all that, we get to start doing the fun stuff, which is editing the look of our ClickFunnel. So in order to do that, once you're inside the funnel, you're going to click on Edit Page. There are a ton of different things that you can do to customize your ClickFunnel. So I'm just going to go over a few. First things first, I am going to go ahead and delete this reminder about the privacy policy because we already placed it in. So to go over a few general things, the first thing that you would probably want to do is edit the information right here. So you would add in your city and then your name or the name of the coach that will be coaching your program. And then if you're running hybrid, you'll instead of typing in Jim, put in coaching program. If you're running an in-person, then you'll put in your type of Jim. From here, one other thing that is going to differentiate in your funnel is going to be whether or not you're running free or non-free ads. If you're running free ads, the funnel is good as it comes. If you are running non-free, make sure to delete the mentions of free at the top here and at the bottom down here. So in order to change the text, all you have to do is click inside. So once I click inside, I can really write anything that I want. Obviously, it would need to be something that makes sense, but this is just an example. If you want to change the color or the style of the text, so the font itself, you would click on this button right here. And it's going to pop up a little sidebar right here. So if you wanted to change the text color, you'd click on text color, choose whatever color you want. If you wanted to change the font, you could select a font by clicking right here. And this is going to work for any area that has text. That isn't an image. From here, another thing that you can do is change your timer. So the timer is currently set up to this red color. If you click inside of the orange box, it'll pop up that sidebar again. You can change how long your timer goes for. So maybe we want to give a little bit more urgency, so we'll give 10 minutes. And then you can change what your actual timer looks like by clicking on themes and choosing whatever timer you want. From here, the other thing that you can do is change your background image. In order to do that, you're going to go to settings right here and then click on background. Most things pop up on the right corner, so that's going to pop up and you're just going to click on this button here. It's going to take you to an area where you can either upload images here or you can choose an image and add it. We do a lot of testing here, so you can see we've had a little bit of fun. I am not going to change our ClickFunnels image. I'm just going to hit cancel for right now. So from here, once you've made all the changes that you want, you're going to go ahead and click the save button twice and exit the funnel. The next thing you'll want to do is go to your thank you page and edit anything on there that you need to customize. So for example, one thing that you will definitely want to pay attention to is that there's a privacy policy reminder up at the top of the thank you page. So you'll definitely want to remove this. It also mentions that there are testimonial images at the bottom. If you have your own, then you'll want to remove these and add in your own. So that's about as far as we typically go with customizing, but have fun with it.
